highlights: Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center exploring queer art.
Kim Yun-shin retrospective at Hoam Museum.
Damien Hirst major survey at MMCA, Seoul.
Seo-Seoul Museum of Art opening with media art focus.
20! 2026 Art Seoul: digital art exhibit with 80% guarantee system.

stocks.market_sentiment: Cautious and bearish; markets are grappling with geopolitical tensions from the Iran conflict, leading to elevated energy prices and inflation concerns.
key_events: Global markets showing cautious/negative sentiment due to Middle East conflict.
Brent crude oil prices around $119/barrel; WTI near $100.
Central banks (Fed, BoC) maintaining hawkish stance with steady rates.
Equities seeing sectoral rotation; investors moving to defensive sectors like consumer staples.
Upcoming economic data (flash PMIs, construction spending) to provide further outlook.
